title: ischaemum rugosum var. distachyum
intro: Ischaemum rugosum var. distachyum, also known as Japanese Millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and easing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Japanese Millet include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create remedies for various health conditions.
